releases.label: DR11
releases.summary: Final UKIDSS release (UKIDSSDR11PLUS, WFCAM Science Archive): data from all five sub-surveys, with new two-epoch deep images (J_1+J_2 for LAS, K_1+K_2 for GPS/GCS). Merged source tables: LAS 88,298,646, GPS 1,006,543,687, GCS 70,837,101, DXS 3,370,835, UDS 296,026 sources (1,169,346,295 total; detection tables hold 3.9 billion individual detections). An initial UDS-only DR11 cut was released 2016-06-29; the full DR11PLUS followed 2019-05-19 and is the last UKIDSS release in the WSA release history. 2010 revised final survey areas: LAS 3,792, GPS 1,851, GCS 1,069, DXS 31, UDS 0.77 deg2; achieved DR11 coverage is published only as MOC maps.
